aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite Tempra HVAC for local HVAC services, but gaps in structured data and conversational content limit their visibility.

Enhance content with conversational language focused on user queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, reviews, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor for any inconsistencies or new citation opportunities.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service information

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations.

ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with HVAC-specific questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by creating in-depth content on installation, maintenance, and energy efficiency.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and AI search.

agency_pitch.proof_point: Current website lacks FAQ schema and conversational content, making it less visible to AI models.

agency_pitch.impact_estimate: 20-30% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
